description: Aired 1957, here's three U.S. commercials for the ill-fated Edsel car, which despite some innovative features ended up being a major commercial failure. The car is considered a sought-after classic today. This was back when a 60-minute show often had less than 10 minutes of commercials, but the commercials were often all for the same company!
